title: coap/codec: content_format() has convoluted slice building
description: In codec.rs:443-451, content_format() builds a temporary slice with complex branching. Rewrite to: let bytes = format.to_be_bytes(); let value = match format { 0 => &bytes[2..2], 1..=0xFF => &bytes[1..2], _ => &bytes[0..2] }; self.option(OptionNumber::ContentFormat as u16, value)
